title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: A Discounted Cash Flow analysis for Zebra Technologies to determine its intrinsic value.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 5.0% - A base revenue growth of 5% is reasonable for Zebra Technologies, capturing the long-term trend of enterprise automation despite near-term cyclicality.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.0% - The terminal growth rate is estimated at 2.0%, aligning with long-term macroeconomic inflation expectations and GDP growth for an established industrial technology company.
assumptions.discountRate: 13.43% - A discount rate of 13.43% is estimated based on the company's high beta of 1.679, combined with a standard 4.2% risk-free rate and 5.5% equity risk premium. This significantly depresses the present value of future cash flows.
